requirement_topic.en: Button and Coin Batteries — Furniture with Remotes, Lighting or Electronic Accessories
requirement_topic.zh: 纽扣/硬币电池——带遥控器、灯具或电子配件的家具
requirement_topic.zht: 鈕扣/硬幣電池——帶遙控器、燈具或電子配件的家具

summary.en: Furniture supplied with a remote control, LED lighting module, memory controller, massage controller, display, sound module, or accessory that contains a button or coin battery must be screened against Australia's mandatory button and coin battery safety and information standards. In-scope goods must have secure, child-resistant battery compartments, required compliance testing, and prescribed warnings and emergency advice on packaging, instructions or the product as applicable. The rules cover consumer goods and accessories that use, are powered by, or operate with button or coin batteries.
summary.zh: 随附遥控器、LED灯模块、记忆控制器、按摩控制器、显示器、声音模块或其他含纽扣/硬币电池配件的家具，必须按澳大利亚纽扣/硬币电池强制安全及信息标准进行筛查。适用商品须具备安全、儿童防开启电池仓，完成所需合规测试，并按适用情况在包装、说明书或产品本体上提供规定警示及应急建议。该规则覆盖使用、由纽扣/硬币电池供电或依靠其运行的消费品及配件。
summary.zht: 隨附遙控器、LED燈模組、記憶控制器、按摩控制器、顯示器、聲音模組或其他含鈕扣/硬幣電池配件的家具，必須按澳洲鈕扣/硬幣電池強制安全及資訊標準進行篩查。適用商品須具備安全、兒童防開啟電池倉，完成所需合規測試，並按適用情況在包裝、說明書或產品本體上提供規定警示及應急建議。該規則覆蓋使用、由鈕扣/硬幣電池供電或依靠其運行的消費品及配件。

standards_or_laws: Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Products Containing Button/Coin Batteries) Information Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Button/Coin Batteries) Safety Standard 2020 — mandatory
Consumer Goods (Button/Coin Batteries) Information Standard 2020 — mandatory
Competition and Consumer Act 2010, Schedule 2 — Australian Consumer Law

summary.en: Chinese export files may include GB 31241 battery reports, UN 38.3 transport records, EMC or electrical reports for accessories, and product assembly inspection records. These do not prove Australian captive-fastener, battery-release, child-resistant access, or warning-label compliance for button and coin batteries.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件可能包括GB 31241电池报告、UN 38.3运输记录、配件EMC或电气报告以及产品装配检验记录。这些资料不能证明澳大利亚纽扣/硬币电池的防脱落紧固件、电池释放、儿童防开启或警示标签合规。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件可能包括GB 31241電池報告、UN 38.3運輸記錄、配件EMC或電氣報告以及產品裝配檢驗記錄。這些資料不能證明澳洲鈕扣/硬幣電池的防脫落緊固件、電池釋放、兒童防開啟或警示標籤合規。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — portable lithium cell and battery safety where applicable
UN Manual of Tests and Criteria, Part III, Section 38.3 — transport evidence
Factory inspection records for remotes and electronic accessories

gap.en: The common export gap is treating a remote or light module as an accessory outside the furniture compliance file. Australia treats in-scope consumer goods and accessories containing button or coin batteries as covered products. The importer should hold SKU-specific battery-compartment test evidence, label artwork, instruction text, and packaging warnings before supply.
gap.zh: 常见出口差距是将遥控器或灯具模块视为家具合规文件之外的配件。澳大利亚将适用的含纽扣或硬币电池消费品及配件纳入覆盖范围。进口商应在供应前保存SKU专属电池仓测试证据、标签图稿、说明书文本及包装警示。
gap.zht: 常見出口差距是將遙控器或燈具模組視為家具合規文件之外的配件。澳洲將適用的含鈕扣或硬幣電池消費品及配件納入覆蓋範圍。進口商應在供應前保存SKU專屬電池倉測試證據、標籤圖稿、說明書文本及包裝警示。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — four ACCC button and coin battery safety and information standards apply to in-scope products and accessories supplied in Australia
mandatory_status.cn: Not equivalent — Chinese battery and accessory reports do not replace Australian button/coin battery mandatory standards

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Screen every furniture SKU with a remote, LED, controller, memory function, sound module or display for button/coin batteries. If any are present, build a separate Australian compliance file for secure compartments, testing and mandatory warnings.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 【仅供参考】凡家具SKU带遥控器、LED、控制器、记忆功能、声音模块或显示器，均应筛查是否含纽扣/硬币电池。如存在，应单独建立澳大利亚合规文件，覆盖安全电池仓、测试及强制警示。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 【僅供參考】凡家具SKU帶遙控器、LED、控制器、記憶功能、聲音模組或顯示器，均應篩查是否含鈕扣/硬幣電池。如存在，應單獨建立澳洲合規文件，覆蓋安全電池倉、測試及強制警示。
